title: Dengue Fever & Tropical Disease Drug Management
description: Explore dengue fever and tropical disease drug management protocols across CARICOM nations like Jamaica, Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize. Understand interactions with traditional bush medicines and pharmacological vector control.
what_youll_learn: Identify Caribbean-specific drug scheduling and formularies for tropical disease management
Analyze interactions between common traditional bush medicines and pharmaceutical drugs
Apply dengue fever treatment protocols across diverse CARICOM healthcare settings
Recommend vector control pharmacology strategies to prevent tropical disease transmission
Communicate effectively with patients about traditional and conventional medicine integration
